doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision, and sections (b) and (c) appear to be entirely invented.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 focuses on multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision requirements, and this document contains invented sections (b) and (c) with fabricated content about paralegals and non-existent "emergency exception" language.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision, and sections (b) and (c) appear to be entirely invented.
